uplink.description: Measurement telegram (ct=9): medium pressure P1, water/conductivity temperature, and temperature-compensated conductivity
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (oracle method). Bytes hand-built: func=1, ct=9, channel mask 0x040A selecting P1, T(Conductivity), Conductivity Tc, each a big-endian IEEE-754 float. Raw values from running reference/upstream-codec.js: P1=1.5 bar, T(Conductivity)=18.5 C, Conductivity Tc=0.8500000238 mS/cm. Converted to canonical units: water.pressure = bar*100 = 150 kPa; water.temperature.current = 18.5 C; water.ec = mS/cm*1000 = 850 uS/cm.

uplink.description: Measurement telegram (ct=3): medium pressure P1, on-board temperature TOB1, barometric pressure PBaro, barometer temperature TBaro
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (oracle method). Bytes hand-built: func=1, ct=3, channel mask 0x00D2 selecting P1, TOB1, PBaro, TBaro, each a big-endian IEEE-754 float. Raw values from running reference/upstream-codec.js: P1=2.0 bar, TOB1=21.799999237 C, PBaro=0.972000002861 bar, TBaro=23.75 C. Converted to canonical units: water.pressure = bar*100 = 200 kPa; water.temperature.current = 21.8 C; barometric PBaro -> extra barometricPressureKpa = bar*100 = 97.2 kPa; TBaro -> extra barometerTemperature = 23.75 C.

uplink.description: Device information telegram (function code 12): battery voltage, capacity, enclosure humidity, identity
uplink._note: Input bytes from the upstream keller-codec TTN example info telegram. Raw values from running reference/upstream-codec.js: battery_voltage=5.083990573883057 V, battery_capacity_percentage=47, humidity_percentage=58. Converted to canonical units: battery_voltage -> battery = 5.084 V (rounded to 3 dp); capacity% -> extra batteryPercent; humidity% -> extra enclosureHumidity; identity fields -> camelCase extras; datetime emitted as RFC3339.
Synthetic: function code 7 is neither a measurement (1) nor an information (12) telegram.
Synthetic: zero-length payload carries no reading.
